name: alpha_cal
comment: Scaling coefficient in calendar aging exponential term

name: calibrated_temp_rise_c4
comment: Steady state temp rise at C/4 discharge C

name: cdd_shift_threshold
comment: CDD threshold to classify as hot day

name: cold_day_peak_shift
comment: Hours to shift peak earlier on cold days

name: container_attenuation
comment: Fraction of outdoor swing that penetrates container

name: default_gradient_factor
comment: Default rack position for single runs

name: dispatch_window_end
comment: Latest time of day for dispatch

name: dispatch_window_start
comment: Earliest time of day for dispatch

name: E_a_cal
comment: Activation energy for calendar aging J/mol

name: E_a_cyc
comment: Activation energy for cycle aging J/mol

name: export_years
comment: Number of years to export for TwinBESS

name: fleet_size
comment: Number of modules in the fleet

name: hdd_shift_threshold
comment: HDD threshold to classify as cold day

name: hot_day_peak_shift
comment: Hours to shift peak later on hot days

name: initial_soc
comment: Initial state of charge when battery is turned on

name: k_cal
comment: Calendar aging base rate per hour

name: measurement_noise_seed
comment: RNG seed for sensor noise in exports

name: morning_peak_hour
comment: Center hour of morning peak on cold days

name: morning_peak_magnitude
comment: Height of morning peak as fraction of base price

name: morning_peak_width
comment: Width of morning peak gaussian hours

name: num_discharge_hours
comment: Number of hours in a single discharge

name: price_ceiling
comment: Max allowed price ERCOT offer cap

name: seasonal_peak_day
comment: Day of year for peak seasonal temperature peak

name: sigma_forecast_price
comment: Standard deviation of price forecast error

name: simulation_years
comment: Duration of the simulation in years

name: SoC_ref
comment: Optimal resting point where calendar degradation is minimized

name: SoH_EOL
comment: SOH below which battery cannot be safely cycled

name: spike_base_magnitude
comment: Base multiplier for Pareto spike magnitudes $/MWh

name: spike_cdd_multiplier
comment: Spike probability multiplier on hot days

name: spike_hdd_multiplier
comment: Spike probability multiplier on cold days

name: spike_temp_threshold
comment: Degree-day threshold to trigger spike multiplier

name: T_BPT
comment: Balance point where HDDs and CDDs are zero C

name: t_formation_hours
comment: Hours from factory formation to site delivery

name: target_volatility_monthly
comment: Target coefficient of variation by month

name: vertical_temp_gradient_C
comment: Temperature gradient bottom to top of rack C

name: viz_lifespan_cap
comment: Maximum projected lifespan for sensitivity analysis (VIZ-8)

name: viz_cohort_high_percentile
comment: Percentile threshold for high quality cohort (VIZ-4)

name: viz_cohort_low_percentile
comment: Percentile threshold for low quality cohort (VIZ-4)

name: viz_position_threshold_high
comment: Vertical position threshold for top rack cohort (VIZ-4)

name: viz_position_threshold_low
comment: Vertical position threshold for bottom rack cohort (VIZ-4)

name: viz_loglog_exclude_years
comment: Years to exclude from log-log regression early transient (VIZ-1)

name: viz_sqrt_exclude_years
comment: Years to exclude from sqrt(t) fits (VIZ-1)

name: viz_revenue_display_start_year
comment: Start year for revenue divergence plot (VIZ-3b)
